creator: marketing@globo.tech
text: Hi guys, I'm working for an ISP called GloboTech Communications, I was wondering if it was possible to add us to the ISP directory, since we do support freeBSD. URL: https://www.freebsd.org/commercial/isp.html GloboTech Communications GloboTech offers world class hosting services and uncompromising support. Their services include Dedicated Servers, Public Cloud & Private Cloud with Fundamental Management and a 100% Power & Network Uptime. Their all-SSD public cloud includes a set of one-click app for faster deployment, less than 90 seconds, and a comprehensive and easy-to-use cloud portal. Let me know if something is missing. Regards, Philippe
